description:
Operational visibility. Datadog for real-time + alerting; Metabase (or Sigma) for finance + product analytics.

**Scope — Datadog dashboards**
- **Webhook health**: receipt rate by provider, signature failure rate, DLQ depth, processor latency p95/p99.
- **MDI health**: API error rate (by class: 4xx / 5xx / 418), token refresh count, case drift count, embedded URL request rate.
- **Stripe health**: webhook lag, drift count, SetupIntent failure rate, payment-method-failure rate.
- **KYC health**: pass rate, decline rate, needs-review backlog age.
- **Onboarding funnel**: signup → consents → KYC → intake → payment → MDI handoff conversion rates per step.

**Scope — Metabase dashboards** (or equivalent, BAA-aware vendor)
- **Per-case PnL**: revenue (Stripe `invoice.paid`) − MDI cost (`partner_charge`) − pharmacy cost (Phase E or TBD).
- **MRR / ARR** by condition.
- **Cohort retention** by signup month.
- **Refund + dunning** trends.

**Acceptance**
- Each Datadog dashboard has at least one alarm rule wired to PagerDuty.
- Metabase dashboards refresh nightly from a read replica.
title: Drift + ops dashboards (Datadog + Metabase)
